# ShiftFlow — AI-Powered Workforce Financial Intelligence Platform

## What is ShiftFlow?
ShiftFlow is an AI-powered iOS application that helps employees, freelancers, contractors, and gig workers protect their income through intelligent payroll monitoring, payday forecasting, burnout prevention, and financial wellness tools.

## Core Mission
"Protect every paycheck." — ShiftFlow ensures every worker is paid fairly, on time, and without error.

## Who uses ShiftFlow?
- Hourly employees (retail, hospitality, healthcare, manufacturing)
- Shift workers (nurses, security guards, factory workers)
- Gig workers (rideshare drivers, delivery workers, task workers)
- Freelancers and independent contractors
- Self-employed professionals

## Key Features
1. **AI Payroll Protection** — Automatically detects underpayments, missing overtime, and payroll errors
2. **Payday Forecasting** — Predicts exact paycheck dates and amounts using AI
3. **Burnout Analytics** — Monitors fatigue, consecutive days worked, and wellbeing indicators
4. **Smart AI Assistant** — Answers payroll and financial questions in plain language
5. **Tax Estimation** — Auto-calculates weekly tax set-aside amounts
6. **Invoice Generator** — Creates professional invoices from logged shifts
7. **Payslip OCR Scanner** — Scans and verifies payslips using computer vision
8. **Financial Health Score** — Holistic wellness score based on work patterns and finances
9. **Work Journal** — Logs mood and energy after shifts
10. **Career Intelligence** — Tracks effective hourly rate progression over time

## Pricing
- Free Trial: 30 days, full access, no credit card required
- ShiftFlow Plus Monthly: $9.99/month
- ShiftFlow Plus Annual: $99/year (save 17%)
- Subscriptions managed through Apple App Store

## Platform
- iOS 16+ (iPhone & iPad)
- Available on the Apple App Store
- Cloud sync with backend AI processing

## Security
- TLS 1.3 encryption in transit
- AES-256 encryption at rest
- GDPR and CCPA compliant
- No data selling, ever
- 30-day soft-delete + full purge on account deletion

## Contact
- Website: https://shiftflowx.net
- Support: support@shiftflowx.net
- Privacy: privacy@shiftflowx.net
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/shiftflow
